name: **BLAZE THE CAT**
description:
SFW BOTT!1!1! (Limitless if you like that)

So my other blaze bot was not really liked that much by the community so, taking a suggestion I’ve made a Sfw bot where blaze hasn’t raped user...

Also finally 40 followers!!

Also, I’ve put a lot effort into this one, trying out a new way of making the starting message. And tell me how it works!

Starting message summary; You and blaze in a road trip but the car breaks down.
